originalTitle: Cathie Wood buys $22.8 million of surging tech stock
summary: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Investment Management, is known for investing in high-growth tech companies. She'll even add to positions amid strong gains, and that's what she just did, adding shares of a megacap stock that has surged 14.8% over the past five days. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF ...

chineseTitle: Cathie Wood 购买了价值 2280 万美元的飙升科技股
chineseSummary: 方舟投资管理公司首席执行官凯西·伍德 (Cathie Wood) 以投资高增长科技公司而闻名。她甚至会在强劲上涨的情况下增持头寸，这就是她刚刚所做的，增持了一只在过去五天里飙升了 14.8% 的巨型股票的股票。 2025年，旗舰方舟创新ETF...
